name: Cranberry Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix Dream Whip in a separate bowl.
2. In a large bowl, whip together the cream cheese, Miracle Whip, sugar, cranberries, and walnuts until well combined.
3. Gently fold in the chilled Dream Whip.
4. Cut the pineapple into smaller chunks and add to the mixture.
5. Chill the salad before serving.
